about.title: About FLYAF
about.missionBold: FLYAF is the streetwear discovery platform that puts every shop and brand on your map.
about.missionText: We help you find the stores that matter, whether you're exploring a new city or planning a weekend route.
about.founderQuote1: "I spent 10 years working the door at the biggest streetwear shops in London. I was there for the queues, the wild drops and the infamous 'brick'.
about.founderQuote2: Working security, I saw how many people missed out on their favourite brands simply because they were around the corner. Interesting shops are always clustered together, but you need to know where to look. I built FLYAF to bridge that gap."
about.exploreDesc: Use the interactive map to discover 200+ shops across 12+ cities, with real-time brand pins and distances.
about.planDesc: Build a custom route on your desktop, then walk it on your phone. Never miss a store again.
about.connectDesc: Post your 'fit checks' to the HOT feed, tag the brands you're wearing, and see what the culture is wearing from Paris to Tokyo.
about.cultureText: FLYAF was born from a simple frustration: streetwear shops are everywhere but hard to find. We aren't a faceless tech company; we're built by people who spent a decade on the door.
about.languageDesc: Navigate in 8 languages, including Japanese, Chinese, and Korean.
about.communityDesc: A dedicated space to discover and be discovered.
about.getInTouchText: Got feedback, want to submit a brand, or interested in becoming a FLYAF Ambassador? We'd love to hear from you.

route.title: Route
route.noStopsHint: Tap shops on the map and add them to your route
route.noStopsHintDesktop: Click pins on the map to add shops to your route
route.signInToSave: Create an account or sign in to save your routes.
route.signInToSaveShort: Sign in to save your routes

onboardingCards.languageNote: FLYAF works in 8 languages. You can change this any time in More → Language.
onboardingCards.card1Body: FLYAF maps 200+ shops across 12+ cities — London, Paris, Tokyo, NYC, and more. Each pin is a real shop with opening hours, address, and everything you need to visit.
onboardingCards.card1Footnote: Tap any pin to see shop details. Tap the city name to switch cities.
onboardingCards.card2Body: Build your route on a laptop tonight, open it on your phone tomorrow and just walk. Or build it on the spot — FLYAF hands off to Google Maps with every stop loaded, no re-entering addresses.
onboardingCards.card3Body: The Index is a global directory of streetwear brands — Established names and rising New Wave labels. Most people know 20–30 brands. FLYAF helps you find the other 130.
onboardingCards.card3Footnote: Collections groups brands by theme: Japanese Streetwear, London Underground Labels, and more.
onboardingCards.card4Body: HOT is a lookbook posted by real people. No captions, no hashtags, no comments. Just fits. React with 🔥 if you feel it, or scroll past. Your Instagram and TikTok are on every post you make — that's the only conversation needed.
onboardingCards.card4Footnote: Tap + to post your own fit. No tagging, no effort.

guide.title: App Guide
guide.subtitle: How every section works
guide.introTip: Tap the tabs below to explore each section of the app.
guide.nearby1: City selector — tap "London" to switch between cities: Paris, Tokyo, NYC and more. The map flies there instantly. Brand pins reload for the new city.
guide.nearby2: Locate me — centres the map on your GPS position. Tap this if the map doesn't find you automatically on first load.
guide.nearby3: Brand pins — each circle shows the brand's actual logo. Tap any pin to slide open the shop info card at the bottom.
guide.nearby4: NEARBY list + count — the number (17) shows shops within range. The list below is sorted nearest first. Tap any shop name to open its full detail page.
guide.nearby5: ✕ Close — dismisses the list and returns to the full map. Pins stay on screen.
guide.nearby6: Row icons (per shop) — ⓘ opens the full shop detail page · ↗ opens the shop's website · ↑ launches single-stop navigation to that shop right now.
guide.nearbyTip: Adding to your route: Tap a shop name (not the icons) to open its detail page. From there you'll find the "Add to Route" button that sends it to the Route tab.
guide.route1: Save — name and save this route (e.g. "Soho Saturday"). It reappears in More → My FLYAF every time you open the app, ready to reload.
guide.route2: Print (PRO) — exports a printable PDF with a map overview, shop addresses, and opening hours. The lock icon means this is a Pro feature.
guide.route3: Share — generates a shareable link to this route. Anyone with the link can open it in FLYAF on their own phone.
guide.route4: Route stats — total distance, walking time estimate, and stop count. These update live as you add or remove shops.
guide.route5: Drag handles (⋮⋮) — hold and drag any stop up or down to reorder your route. Distance and time recalculate automatically.
guide.route6: Start Navigation — opens Google Maps with every stop loaded in order. Walk the whole route hands-free without touching your phone again.
guide.route7: Clear Route — removes all stops and starts a fresh route. A confirmation prompt appears first.
guide.routeTip: The power move: Build tonight's route on a desktop (bigger screen, easier to plan), save it, then open the saved route on your phone tomorrow and just tap Start Navigation.
guide.index1: Collections — curated themed groups: "Japanese Streetwear", "London Underground Labels", "Brands Under 5K Followers". A great way to discover brands you'd never find by searching.
guide.index2: Established / New Wave — toggle between heritage brands with decades of history and emerging labels that are rising right now.
guide.index3: Search bar — type any brand name, country, or style to filter instantly. The ▼ button opens sorting options: A–Z, most shops, newest added.
guide.index4: Category filter (All ▼) — narrow to a specific style: Sneakers, Techwear, Gorpcore, Workwear, Japanese, Women-Led, and more.
guide.index5: Heart ♡ / ♥ — filled red means saved. Tap to add a brand to your watchlist in My FLYAF. You'll see their new drops there first.
guide.index6: Web / Insta / Shops pills — tap Web for the brand's site, Insta for their profile, Shops to see their pins filtered on the map.
guide.indexTip: Full brand page: Tap the card itself (not the pills) to open the brand profile — full description, country of origin, stockists, affiliated shops, and upcoming drops.
guide.hot1: Trending This Week — the highest fire-reacted fits of the last 7 days. Scroll right to see up to 5. The community, not an algorithm, decides what's trending.
guide.hot2: Filter — narrow the feed by style tag: techwear, gorpcore, vintage, workwear, minimalist. Or filter to show only people you follow.
guide.hot3: Trending toggle — switch between newest posts first and ranked by fire count. Both feeds are entirely community-posted, no editorial curation.
guide.hot4: 🔥 fire + username — tap the flame to react. No likes, no comments — just fire or silence. Tap the username or avatar to follow them and see their future posts.
guide.hot5: + Upload — tap to post your fit. Select a photo from your camera roll. No caption, no hashtags, no tagging required — just post it.
guide.hotTip: The philosophy: HOT has no comments, no DMs, no text. Streetwear culture is image-driven — your fit speaks for itself. If someone wants to connect, your Instagram and TikTok are on every post automatically.
guide.more1: My FLYAF — your personal space: saved routes, favourited brands, favourited shops. Everything you've hearted anywhere in the app collects here.
guide.more2: Sign In badge — My FLYAF, Profile, and Notifications require a free account. Tap Sign In — takes under 30 seconds with Apple, Google, or email.
guide.more3: Contact — message the FLYAF team directly. Also where to submit a brand you think should be in the Index. No sign-in needed.
guide.more4: Language section — scroll right to see all 8 languages. Tap any pill to switch the entire app instantly. Also accessible via Settings → Language.
guide.more5: Active language (red pill) — currently selected language. Tap any other language pill to switch. Your choice is saved and remembered across sessions.
guide.moreTip: First time? Switch your language here before exploring anything else — all menus, descriptions, and labels will be in your language from that point on.
